# Implementation Plan: Advanced Shapes v0.2

**Branch**: `002-advanced-shapes` | **Date**: 2026-03-01 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/002-advanced-shapes/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

Extend the Stage 1 SVG shape engine with five new geometric primitives — trapezoid, octagon, polygon (n-sided), oval, and freeform blob — all accessible through the unchanged `generate()` entry point as new discriminant values on the `Shape` union. Each new type adds its own render function in `src/shapes/`, extends canonicalization and validation, and preserves every Stage 1 invariant (determinism, canonicalization, valid SVG, shape count, shape identity). The blob shape introduces a lightweight (~10-line) pure-TypeScript mulberry32 PRNG for seed-based procedural control-point placement, with a Catmull-Rom → cubic Bézier conversion for SVG path output. Zero new runtime dependencies.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.4 (strict mode)
**Primary Dependencies**: None at runtime; Vitest 1.x (dev)
**Storage**: N/A
**Testing**: Vitest 1.x
**Target Platform**: Node.js / any ES2020-capable JS runtime (library)
**Project Type**: Library
**Performance Goals**: Byte-for-byte deterministic output; no measurable per-call overhead
**Constraints**: Zero runtime dependencies; pure function; no side effects; no I/O
**Scale/Scope**: Single entry point; 5 new shape types added to existing 4; two output modes

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Principle | Status | Notes |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| Scope Discipline | ✅ PASS | Only geometric shape generation. No composition, layout, color theory, or text. |
| Composability | ✅ PASS | Each new shape is a self-contained SVG element; no context assumptions. |
| Incremental Expansion | ✅ PASS | Additive new `type` values on the discriminated union; no Stage 1 rewrites. |
| Deterministic Variation | ✅ PASS | Blob PRNG is seeded from `seed + index`; no `Math.random()` anywhere. |
| Domain Integrity | ✅ PASS | Octagon is a distinct domain type even though it could be computed as `polygon{sides:8}`. |
| Geometry First | ✅ PASS | No styling fields (opacity, fill, stroke, gradient) introduced in this stage. |
| Library-First Core | ✅ PASS | Pure function, explicit I/O, zero side effects, independently testable. |
| Explicit Contracts | ✅ PASS | Canonicalization extended to new types; all unknown fields dropped; replay = seed + canonical config. |
| Layer Boundaries | ✅ PASS | `src/` has no imports from application layers, composition, or rulebook. |

**Constitution Check Result**: All gates PASS. No violations to justify.

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/
├── index.ts             # Public entry point — exports generate() [unchanged]
├── types.ts             # Add 5 new shape interfaces + extend Shape union
├── generate.ts          # Add 5 new cases to the switch statement
├── canonicalize.ts      # Extend allowed fields for 5 new shape types
├── validate.ts          # Extend validation for 5 new shape types
├── id.ts                # [unchanged]
├── fmt.ts               # [unchanged]
├── svg.ts               # [unchanged — blob uses "path" tag, already in ShapeElement]
├── prng.ts              # NEW: mulberry32 PRNG seeded per-shape for blob
└── shapes/
    ├── square.ts        # [unchanged]
    ├── rectangle.ts     # [unchanged]
    ├── circle.ts        # [unchanged]
    ├── triangle.ts      # [unchanged]
    ├── trapezoid.ts     # NEW
    ├── octagon.ts       # NEW
    ├── polygon.ts       # NEW
    ├── oval.ts          # NEW
    └── blob.ts          # NEW

tests/
├── generate.test.ts     # Extend with new shape type cases + determinism
├── canonicalize.test.ts # Extend with new type unknown-field tests
├── validate.test.ts     # Extend with new type error paths
├── id.test.ts           # [unchanged]
├── invariants.test.ts   # Extend invariant checks to cover new types
└── shapes/
    ├── square.test.ts   # [unchanged]
    ├── rectangle.test.ts # [unchanged]
    ├── circle.test.ts   # [unchanged]
    ├── triangle.test.ts # [unchanged]
    ├── trapezoid.test.ts # NEW
    ├── octagon.test.ts   # NEW
    ├── polygon.test.ts   # NEW
    ├── oval.test.ts      # NEW
    └── blob.test.ts      # NEW
```

**Structure Decision**: Single project. All source under `src/`; all tests under `tests/`. Mirrors Stage 1 structure. Five new render modules in `src/shapes/`; one shared PRNG utility in `src/prng.ts`.
